titleStmt.title: SII 6.640: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 640. (A.R. No. 194 of 1899). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE; FIRST TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavarṣamulu 1073 nēṁṭi pramōdasaṁvatsaramuna kanyamāsamuna sōmagrahaṇanimittamuna koṭṭiyadona śrītribhuvanamallakēśavadēvaraku svasti sakalasurāsurādhīśvaraparamēśvarapaḍihārīkriti vasiṣṭagōtra kriṣṇadhvajapaiśācika paṭupaṭaha ghōṣaṇa vriṣabhalāṁcchana naṁdagirinātha paṟvipuravarādhīśvara kārmmakharāma monagemuṁko
lva Ahitadhanaṁjaya patihitābharaṇasahaja yakāṟa śaraṇāgatavajraprākāra samaraikamārtta yubhayarāyakaṭakamunneṟva celvānegalla gajadānamalla kīrttigenalla vīraperbbāṇa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara cūṟaballirāju tama taṁḍri cūṟaballirājunaku dharmmuvugāṁ gammanāṁṭilōna mā jīvitaṁbaina ṟāmakūri tūrppuna kriṣṇarēvaḍu
bhūmi padivuṭlunu yūri yuttaramuna reṁḍu vuṭluṁgā berasi paṁḍreṁḍu vuṭlu havibaliyarcchanalaku nācaṁdrārkkatārakamugā niccitimi . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā bahubhiścānupālitā . yesya yesya yedā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . 1 svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] śaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.]
Digital edition of SII 6.640 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
